mapper.sql: INSTANCE_ID, STRATEGY_ID, SYMBOL_CONFIG_ID, TAG_CODE, TAG_NAME, STATUS, CONFIG_SNAPSHOT, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, TRADER_NO, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, END_TIME, INITIAL_POSITION_SNAP, FINAL_POSITION_SNAP, CUM_QTY, CUM_AMOUNT
mapper.insert: insert into GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE ( INSTANCE_ID, TAG_NAME, STRATEGY_ID, SYMBOL_CONFIG_ID, TAG_CODE, STATUS, CONFIG_SNAPSHOT, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, TRADER_NO, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, INITIAL_POSITION_SNAP ) VALUES ( #{instanceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tagName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{strategyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{symbolConfigId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tagCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configSnapshot, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{traderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initialPositionSnap, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE SET STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_TIME = #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, FINAL_POSITION_SNAP = #{finalPositionSnap, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUM_QTY = #{cumQty, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CUM_AMOUNT = #{cumAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL} WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE sc where sc.INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND sc.DEL_FLAG = '0'
